data.title: FirstMile, ACI Logistix, and Sendle merge under FAST Group, backed by Federation Asset Management, to offer better logistics solutions for all shippers.
data.description: In Long Beach, California, FirstMile, ACI Logistix, and Sendle have collectively revealed a significant merger under the FAST Group umbrella with investment support from Federation Asset Management. This strategic move combines the strengths and capabilities of the three logistics companies to better address the evolving shipping requirements of businesses, of which the combined entity will be headquartered in California.

data.title: SignalWire releases beta of open source Call Fabric SDK & Reference App for modern communications. Empowers developers with JavaScript-based SDK for web, iOS, and Android.
data.description: SignalWire, a leading provider of Programmable Unified Communications, has unveiled the open beta of its Call Fabric SDK and Reference App. This release allows developers to create and personalize communication applications rapidly. It includes the SignalWire Voice AI Agent for intelligent solutions. The Call Fabric SDK, which is JavaScript-based and includes React Native adaptors for mobile, can be used across web, iOS, and Android platforms. This marks a significant milestone for SignalWire's commitment to innovation in the realm of communications technology.

data.title: Fintiv files lawsuit against Apple for theft of mobile wallet technology, alleging RICO violations and trade secret misappropriation.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Fintiv, Inc., a renowned company in digital wallet ecosystems, has filed a civil lawsuit against Apple, Inc. in the Northern District of Georgia, Atlanta Division. The lawsuit alleges violations of various laws including the Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations (RICO) Act, Georgia's RICO Act, The Defend Trade Secrets Act, and Georgia's Trade Secret Act. The legal action, handled by Kasowitz LLP, accuses Apple of engaging in a series of racketeering activities.

data.title: University Place Asset Management and Axonic Capital provide $97.5M construction financing for Rosewood Residences in Dallas.
data.description: In Dallas, University Place Asset Management and Axonic Capital have extended a senior construction financing of $97.5 million to the developers of Rosewood Residences. This luxury condominium project, known as Rosewood Residences Turtle Creek, will feature 33 units across 17 stories in the University Place neighborhood.

Firefighters are continuing to battle a huge fire in southern France, the biggest the country has seen in 76 years. A 65-year-old woman has died, and at least a dozen other people have been injured since the blaze first broke out on August 5. Around 130 square kilometers have

data.title: ConocoPhillips reports Q2 earnings, exceeding production guidance. Expects $7B free cash flow by 2029. Plans $1B synergies and $5B asset sales by 2026.
data.description: ConocoPhillips reported its second-quarter 2025 financial results, with 2,391,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day produced, generating $1.42 per share in adjusted earnings and $4.7 billion of CFO. They returned $2.2 billion to shareholders, with $5.7 billion in cash and short-term investments. The company exceeded its Marathon Oil acquisition case, upgrading low-cost supply resource estimates by 25% and realizing over $1 billion in synergies. Additionally, they identified over $1 billion in cost reductions and margin enhancements. The company's strategic initiatives aim to drive over $2 billion in improvements by 2026, with an increased asset sales target of $5 billion by next year. These efforts are expected to enhance the company's long-term value proposition, positioning them for strong free cash flow growth. The company expects a $7 billion free cash flow inflection by 2029, nearly doubling the consensus free cash flow expectation for the entire company this year. Ryan Lance, Chairman and CEO, highlighted the company's unique position in the sector and expressed optimism about their future prospects. Andy O'Brien, CFO, discussed the company's strong execution and outlined their strategic achievements, emphasizing the significant outperformance against their acquisition case and the additional opportunities for cost reduction and margin enhancement. The company also expects clear free cash flow tailwinds in the second half of the year. Questions from analysts focused on the company's free cash flow projections, cost reduction initiatives, and the impact of their strategic objectives on long-term value creation.

data.title: Dow falls 300 points, Dow at 43,864.15, NASDAQ at 15,113.04, S&P 500 at 6,316.34. US initial claims rise to 226,000.
data.description: In the midst of trading, U.S. stocks experienced a decline as the Dow Jones index dropped over 300 points on Thursday. The Dow decreased by 0.74% to 43,864.15, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.27% to 21,113.04. Similarly, the S&P 500 also saw a decrease, falling by 0.45% to 6,316.34. Utilities sector saw a rise of 1.2%, while health care stocks fell by 1.2%. U.S. initial jobless claims rose by 7,000 to 226,000 in the last week of July, surpassing the expected 221,000. Notably, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: AVAH ) shares surged by 42% to $5.54 post reporting strong second-quarter results and providing FY25 revenue guidance above forecasts. Another notable stock was Brilliant Earth Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: Full story available on Benzinga.com). On the other hand, Jim Cramer shared concerns about a financial stock being too risky and mentioned challenges for Salesforce currently.

data.title: Dentsply Sirona reports Q2 earnings of 52 cents/share, surpassing estimate of 50 cents/share. Sales at $936 million decline of 4.9%.
data.description: Dentsply Sirona Inc. (NASDAQ: XRAY) saw its shares decline on Thursday as the company announced second-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 52 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 50 cents. Quarterly sales totaled $936 million, exhibiting a 4.9% decrease from the previous year but beating the Street's expectation of $931.349 million. Sales for the Connected Technology Solutions unit dropped by 5.9% at constant currency, whereas Essential Dental Solutions experienced a 1.1% increase. In contrast, Orthodontic and Implant Solutions witnessed a significant decline of 19.4%, and Wellspect Healthcare sales fell by 2.5%. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sprout Social exceeded Q2 expectations, with earnings of 18 cents and sales of $111.110 million, leading to raised FY25 sales guidance.
data.description: Sprout Social, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPT) announced impressive second-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company also provided third-quarter sales guidance that exceeded estimates and raised its FY25 sales guidance. In the second quarter, Sprout Social posted earnings of 18 cents per share, outperforming the analyst consensus of 15 cents per share. Additionally, the company reported quarterly sales of $111.110 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $110.920 million. CEO Ryan Barretto expressed satisfaction with the 12% revenue growth and profitability achieved in the quarter and emphasized the company's dedication to enhancing its performance.

data.title: Opendoor Technologies, Inc. faces challenges in a difficult US housing market with high mortgage rates, weakened demand.
data.description: Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) is currently facing challenges in the U.S. housing market due to high mortgage rates and weakened demand. The CEO described the market as "very challenging," with cautious optimism expressed during the Q2 earnings call. The company's short-term outlook anticipates low volumes due to macroeconomic factors, leading to sequential revenue declines in the third and fourth quarters. Persistently high mortgage rates are suppressing buyer demand, indicating a tough road ahead for Opendoor. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
Board of Directors undergoes a reshuffle; new additions of 3 members; total count now stands at 10.

data.title: Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) to release Q4 and FY 2025 results on Aug 21, 2025, with a conference call at 10 am ET. Webcast available on the company's website.
data.description: The Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) from Westerville, Ohio, revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, August 21, 2025, before the market opens. They will conduct a conference call at 10:00 am ET on the same day to discuss these results, with the webcast available on their website, investors.marzetticompany.com. This update includes important details about the company's performance and aims to provide stakeholders with valuable insights.

data.title: Kubit introduces 'Ask Kubit', an AI interface for customer journey analytics, enabling plain English queries for instant answers from data.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in LOS ALTOS, California, the top customer journey analytics platform, Kubit, introduced Ask Kubit, a conversational AI interface. This innovative feature enables teams to inquire using simple language and obtain immediate responses from their data without the need for SQL programming.

data.title: Ramaco Resources, Inc. completes $200 million public offering by selling 10,666,667 shares of Class A stock.
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on August 7, 2025, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB) disclosed the successful conclusion of its recent underwritten public offering of Class A common stock. The offering, which involved the sale of 10,666,667 shares, was finalized by the Company.

data.title: Hawai'i Gov. Josh Green will keynote at Novogradac 2025 Fall Affordable Housing Conference in Honolulu, addressing state-specific challenges and opportunities on Sept. 10-11.
data.description: The Novogradac 2025 Fall Affordable Housing Conference on September 10-11 in San Francisco will feature Hawai'i Gov. Josh Green as the keynote speaker. Attendees will discuss construction challenges and opportunities specific to the state. The conference aims to address important issues in affordable housing, with a focus on innovative solutions. With a diverse group of participants, the event is expected to draw in a significant number of stakeholders interested in the affordable housing sector. Governor Green's insights are anticipated to provide valuable perspectives on the current housing landscape in Hawai'i.

data.title: CATalyst Council conducts 40,000-household study to improve feline health, bridging care gap with emotional insights.
data.description: Annapolis, Maryland - CATalyst Council, in honor of International Cat Day on August 8th, has revealed plans for furthering their efforts in enhancing the feline veterinary industry and transforming the landscape of cat care by launching a comprehensive survey study. This nationwide initiative aims to gather insights from 40,000 households to address the feline care disparity and revolutionize the approach to cat-focused healthcare. The survey will delve into emotional, behavioral, and psychological aspects pertaining to feline well-being.

data.title: 2025 Principal Charity Classic raised record $10.6 million for Iowa youth; event raised $73 million since 2007.
data.description: The annual PGA TOUR Champions event, the Principal Charity Classic, held in Des Moines, Iowa, disclosed that the 2025 tournament has set a new record by raising an impressive $10.6 million for the support and benefit of Iowa youth programs and initiatives, the highest amount in its history. This brings the total charitable contribution from the event to over $73 million since 2007 when Principal Financial Group® took on the role of title sponsor. Board chair for the charity, Ken McCullum, highlighted that this milestone underscores the steadfast dedication of the community in rallying behind the youth of Iowa.
